GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "The hair care and styling essentials to gift mum during Mother's Day in self-isolation", "Ensure that self-care is a part of her daily routine too.", "In these uncertain times of Covid-19 the discussion around self-care seems to be the only definite topic during daily Zoom calls. Limited access to beauty professionals has resulted in an increase of at-home care and with Mother's Day quickly approaching there is no better time to treat your mum with a gift that allows her to treat herself. Whilst most salons remain open the benefits of investing in the right products to enhance results in between salon visits is undeniable. Hairhouse salon-meets-store approach means that you can make an appointment for a routine cut, colour or treatment as well as shop their extensive product in person with the help of a Hair & Beauty Advisor or online. And with over 115 stores all over Australia and online, finding mum's favourite products (or the products she never knew she needed) has never been more convenient. To celebrate Mother's Day, Hairhouse have collaborated with 3 women: Clementine McVeigh, Emma Bangay and Chelsea Scanlan. When it comes to hair, each of these women varies, but what they do have in common is their resilience and their appreciation and positive effects of self-care during these testing times and beyond. As well the external changes occurring due to unprecedented factors, seasonal changes in weather are affecting our skin and hair whilst at home. For Clementine McVeigh, isolation has meant giving her long brown hair a break from constant heat styling and "putting a treatment in it twice a week." See McVeigh's list of products here. Emma Bangay advises on the importance of a well-suited shampoo and conditioner, which should not be overlooked, Bangay advises mums on curly hair like hers requires specific products from start to finish "Don't fight your curls. You will always lose! Instead, nurture them with the right products, starting with a shampoo designed for curls, like Redken Duo Frizz Dismiss Shampoo and Conditioner." Shop her solution to curly hair here. Isolation haircuts have become a trend, where people are trying out styles they may not have previously, luckily Hairhouse salons are still open which means you can put your kitchen scissors down and leave it to the professionals. Model Chelsea Scanlan discusses the benefits of her chic haircut and a streamlined approach to styling that involves minimal effort with the tools and products that you need here. Bring the salon to your mother this Mother's Day with Hairhouse or experience. Whether you get the chance to celebrate with her, drop something past or send directly to her mailbox, ensure that self-care is a part of her daily routine too."
